---
title: "A Beautiful Graphic"
author: "Hyder Ali"
format: html
execute:
  echo: false
---

Hyder Ali is a data maestro

```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(tidyverse))
```

```{r}
ggplot(mtcars, aes(x = wt, y = mpg, color = factor(cyl))) +
  geom_point(size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  labs(
    title = "Fuel Efficiency vs Car Weight",
    subtitle = "A beautiful graphic using mtcars",
    x = "Weight (1000 lbs)",
    y = "Miles per Gallon (MPG)",
    color = "Cylinders"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
